grantor.name: Hudson Yards Holdings LLC
grantor.address: 250 Hudson Street, Suite 400, New York, NY 10013
grantor.capacity: a New York limited liability company

grantee.name: Meridian Commercial Partners LLC
grantee.address: 88 Pine Street, 12th Floor, New York, NY 10005

legalDescription: Beginning at a point on the southerly side of West 37th Street distant 150 feet westerly from the corner formed by the intersection of the southerly side of West 37th Street with the westerly side of Ninth Avenue; RUNNING THENCE southerly parallel with Ninth Avenue 98 feet 9 inches; THENCE westerly parallel with West 37th Street 50 feet; THENCE northerly again parallel with Ninth Avenue 98 feet 9 inches to the southerly side of West 37th Street; THENCE easterly along the southerly side of West 37th Street 50 feet to the point or place of BEGINNING. Said premises being designated on the Tax Map of the City of New York as Block 734, Lot 42, and known as 415 West 37th Street, New York, NY 10018.
considerationText: FOUR MILLION TWO HUNDRED FIFTY THOUSAND AND 00/100 DOLLARS ($4,250,000.00)
conveyanceClause: does hereby grant and release unto the Grantee, the heirs or successors and assigns of the Grantee forever, ALL that certain plot, piece or parcel of land, with the buildings and improvements thereon erected, situate, lying and being in the Borough of Manhattan, City, County and State of New York.

encumbrances.description: That certain restrictive covenant recorded in Reel 4821, Page 118, in the Office of the City Register of the City of New York, limiting the use of the premises to commercial and light-manufacturing purposes, prohibiting residential occupancy, and requiring maintenance of the landmarked masonry facade, which covenant runs with the land and binds the Grantee and its successors and assigns.

signatures.name: Jonathan M. Feldman
signatures.capacity: Managing Member of Hudson Yards Holdings LLC

notaryAcknowledgment.jurisdiction: State of New York, County of New York

preparedBy: Rosenthal, Weiss & Cohen LLP, 1290 Avenue of the Americas, New York, NY 10104
returnTo: Meridian Commercial Partners LLC, 88 Pine Street, 12th Floor, New York, NY 10005
